快3旗下的可靠平台推荐【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238994461_64833304<br>vk.com/topic-238940166_63514268<br>vk.com/topic-238952810_64261218<br>vk.com/topic-238999481_64833314<br>vk.com/topic-238949737_64618409<br>vk.com/topic-238896817_64618395<br>vk.com/topic-238952986_63514264<br>vk.com/topic-238982414_63163999<br>vk.com/topic-238999486_63514284<br>vk.com/topic-238917386_63514292<br>vk.com/topic-238882003_63378850<br>vk.com/topic-238951571_64833322<br>vk.com/topic-238951759_63959589<br>vk.com/topic-238901783_63378849<br>vk.com/topic-238953044_63164021<br>vk.com/topic-238981253_63378937<br>vk.com/topic-238989737_64618424<br>vk.com/topic-238896812_63776513<br>vk.com/topic-238890129_63959626<br>vk.com/topic-238980413_63378901<br>vk.com/topic-238940164_63164030<br>vk.com/topic-238999472_63776541<br>vk.com/topic-238904857_64618461<br>vk.com/topic-238909273_63378909<br>vk.com/topic-238916119_63959647<br>vk.com/topic-238981690_64261281<br>vk.com/topic-238948545_63077328<br>vk.com/topic-238951214_63164068<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_63685616<br>vk.com/topic-238952821_64833366<br>vk.com/topic-238999527_64618476<br>vk.com/topic-238994658_63685646<br>vk.com/topic-238981253_63378985<br>vk.com/t
